transcript.clean_text: with two mountain stages on the menu this weekend will be a trial for the peloton today the pack will have to handle the very first out of category ascent of this addition the this impressive ascent there's enough time to warm up for the teams and sporting directors there is no difficulty on the first 80 kilometers and this inspires some to try their luck with a breakaway de la bandera but before that there's the nearly vertical climb to Val de penas tahime with slopes of up to 25 percent another demanding ascent and when it gets to the steep wall 30 kilometers from arrival the escape hoop falls apart and their lead is reduced to two minutes the pack comes closer and Rafa Micah decides to attack ten kilometers from the finish line he leaves the other breakaways behind and climbs the sierra de la bandera for a first stage win on his fifth welter he passes to finish line narrowly before being reeled in by the group of favorites again a driving force at the end of the stage Alberto Contador attacks three and a half kilometers from arrival anybody follows but the two don't manage to distance Christopher Froome then Miguel Alki Lopez tries his luck and the Colombian already stage winner this week finishes second 27 seconds behind Rafa Micha me Balian Foom arrived together but the Sprint gives me buddy a 4 second bonus and the Italian makes up a little time in the race ranking 156 kilometers and elite and enough energy left for a solitary ride to the stage win Rafa Micah was in great shape today narrowly beaten by Giuliana philippe at Kaka Ducati the man from Bora Hans who he managed to leave all the favourites behind on the exhausting final ascent it's the second polish to take a stage in the world at 2017 and he is a worthy successor to Damiano Kunigal the last to win at Pantera after a solitary run in 2009 taurine crush and troponin am ii i inverter for GC and I'm sick I almost go home and now I'm so happy but I've no happy because I win I happy for my teammates because today we would do very good job and Tim is all the times to trust me and I'm so happy and believe me that's why I win today first stage win for team Vova Hans coil on this welter behind my car Nicola hey Lopez confirms his qualities as a climber by leaving the group of favourites behind on the final ascent liebelei receives four bonus points and now lies 55 seconds behind Froome in the race ranking Chavez and dela Cruz suffered on the Pantera today and fall back in the overall ranking which benefits Kellerman and Sakharine second day in the mountains tomorrow with a short and aggressive stage only 130 kilometer long but with differences in altitude of 3200 meters all together right before the second day off on Monday it should be a crucial stage for those who hope to arrive victorious at Madrid you
